reviews.review_description: I played this game for like 10 to 20 minutes and I loved it is kind of like a puzzle game very cute I am so happy I got it loving it keep them coming
Great vr experience mixing third person and first person moments. My mom and kids loved it. It is great for a short first vr entry, easy to share with family and friends.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your nice comment, radagast!

reviews.review_title: More a demo than full game
reviews.review_description: It's cute and charming. Has the potetial to become a really nice adventure game if they expand the game. I wish one could disable the "timed gaze trigger" and have to tap to perforn an action.

💖I like your game for the amount of time that I played it my dear friends. So I really can't say how long or short  your game is.  But for the amount of time that I did play your game I had  fun playing it.💖Thank you for making the game.💖Great work.💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖

reviews.review_title: Not enough for its price but enjoyable
reviews.review_description: Nice story , nice puzzles, nice difficulty , nice art.  Not enough content and slow paced gameplay
Too short but it was tricky. Fun little game just to pass time.
Extremely short My comment is longer in history.
